name: tidy3d
description: Tidy3D simulation tools for AI coding agents via tidy3d-mcp.

interface.shortDescription: AI-optimized search for Tidy3D docs and APIs.
interface.longDescription: Use Tidy3D through your AI coding agent via tidy3d-mcp for AI-optimized documentation search, API lookup, and simulation-focused assistance. Requires uv to launch tidy3d-mcp via uvx.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a Tidy3D simulation.
Review this Tidy3D script for errors.
